title: centaurella autumnalis
intro: Centaurella autumnalis, also known as Autumn Knawel or Autumn Centaurella, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its small yellow flowers and distinctive hairy leaves. The medicinal properties of Centaurella autumnalis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential remedy for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Centaurella autumnalis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its dried leaves can be used in traditional medicine for various health benefits.
